name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-5
title: Tech stack unification: replace mixed shell/bash/python with a single clean portable stack
description: Tech stack unified to python. All bash scripts with embedded python3 heredocs or inline python3 -c calls across contract, rabbit-cage, and rabbit-feature-scope features must be converted to pure Python scripts invoked as 'python3 script.py'. Callers must be updated to match.
